doc_title: Reporting Items for Systematic Reviews — PRISMA 2020 Statement
label: fabricated
reason: The PRISMA 2020 citation is real, but the document's content (sections on "Citation Verification" and "Common Errors in Citation Practice") is invented and does not reflect the actual 27-item checklist of the PRISMA 2020 statement.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 88
REASON: The citation (Page et al., BMJ 2021, doi:10.1136/bmj.n71) is real, but the actual PRISMA 2020 statement contains a 27-item checklist with specific reporting items, not these invented sections on "Citation Verification" and "Common Errors in Citation Practice."
